text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I head to the rooftop to take<n>a breather,
when...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Weak! You're so weak! You're weak<n>as hell!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Gah, not half bad! I guess the rumors<n>about your
competitive prowess were<n>true!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What the heck is going on over there?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A duel. And a very serious one at<n>that, with their
pride on the line.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hah! I've found the last yakisoba<n>dog! Must be
my lucky day. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, all I need to do is bring it to the<n>register and
bu—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship and Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You're... Nakayama, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Yo, Golshi. Lookin' pretty chipper,<n>aren't ya?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: By the way, I've got something to<n>say to ya.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: How funny. I've got something tosay to you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship and Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Get yer filthy mitts off my yakisoba<n>dog!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...And that's how a duel started over<n>the last
yakisoba dog.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You should have seen the look in their<n>eyes
when they asked me to judge.<n>Dead serious.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...I see. So what kind of duel is it?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A game of menko. With the standard<n>rules, it
seems. To take your<n>opponent's cards, you
have to flip<n>them over using your own.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I've got three, and you're down to<n>two... So, are
you gonna step up your<n>game, or what?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Quit your yapping! Take this!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Swoosh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, crap. I missed.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Your throw is no match for<n>mine! I'm
going to take everything<n>from you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Swoooosh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No... can it be? The famed Demonic<n>Flip! The
technique only those who<n>train in the mountains
can learn!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...Now I'm up to four. All I need is one<n>more to
win.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh. What a pity. Are you really going<n>to let it end
like this, Golshi?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
A measly ant, hopelessly gazing up at<n>the
heavens! Is this how you want to<n>go out?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
(I need to calm down and think. This<n>is no time to
get flustered! There are<n>still three on the field!)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
(If she steals one more from me, I'm<n>a goner!
It'd be a complete and utter<n>shutout!)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: (But I'm still in this!)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
(Show no fear! Go for the win! What I<n>need to do
now is...)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
(Be brave against the unknown! For<n>victory! For
luck! I won't let either slip<n>away!)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: GRAAAH! TAKE THIIIIIS!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Swooosh!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
What?! I've broken you down and<n>yet you still
refuse to yield?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You still choose to aim for the<n>heavens, despite
being shackled to<n>the earth?! Haha! Amazing!
Amazing!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's been almost two and a half<n>hours... But
we're still going at it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Phew... You're making me sweat<n>more than
when I run.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I love it, Nakayama! You have my<n>admiration!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Tch... Ha, ha, hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Funny, I was thinkin' the same<n>thing... You're on
fire, Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship and Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: We're both friends and foes!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I see. This is the blossoming of a<n>new
friendship.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uh? What? I have literally no idea<n>what's
happening...
